introduction: Follow these steps to explore joins and subqueries.

steps.title: Step 1: Write an Inner Join
steps.content: Write a query joining Employees and Departments on DepartmentID.

steps.title: Step 2: Write a Left Join
steps.content: Modify the query to be a LEFT JOIN to see Employees without Departments.

steps.title: Step 3: Write a Subquery
steps.content: Find the employee with the highest salary using a nested SELECT MAX(Salary).
